LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON AUGUST 25, 2023. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL LANDLORD/TENANT CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. COURTESY COPIES OF ALL PAPERS MUST BE DELIVERED TO THAT DEPARTMENT BY AUGUST 15, 2023. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-16-2023 IN 206, TELEPHONIC APPEARANCES THROUGH COURTCALL FOR MOVING PARTY AND DEFENDANTS. NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT 2B LIVING, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO 10/23/23 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY IS ACCORDING TO THE 9/18/23 TRIAL DATE. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $60.00 (FOR A NEW NOTICED MOTION) IS IMPOSED ON MOVING PARTIES FOR FAILURE TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES AND THE SANCTION IS DUE BY 4:00PM TODAY. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 14, 2023 FOR THE PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350(F)(1)-(2). AMENDED SEPARATE STATEMENT IN OPPOSITION MUST BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN AUGUST 28, 2023 BY 5:00 P.M. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN AND SHOW THAT "ALL CLAIMS KNOWN OR UNKNOWN" (SEE ISSUES LISTED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION) HAVE BEEN RELEASED AGAINST IT AS A RESULT OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE TENANT AND THE LANDLORD. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN ACCORDANCE WITH CCP SECTION 437C(G) AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC RULE 3.1312(B); JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; COURT REPORTER: DINA CURRADO, CSR #10908, DINACURRADO@GMAIL.COM, 661-675-5688 (D501)

Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Continued To Oct-23-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

William Horsey; Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP; 415-362-2580; appearing as counsel for defendant De Wolf Realty Co.
Kimberly D. Pye; Wilson, Elser, Moskowitz, Edelman & Dicker LLP; 415-433-0990; appearing as counsel for defendant De Wolf Realty Co.
Ryan M. Herrera and Aser Tolentino; Tenant Law Group, PC; 888-510-7511; appearing as counsel for plaintiffs Anna Simmons and Jeff Haviken.

Defendant contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that "all claims known or unknown" (See issues listed in the Notice of Motion) have been released against it as a result of the settlement agreement between the tenant and the landlord.

Prevailing party to prepare order in accordance with CCP Section 437c(g) and in compliance with CRC Rule 3.1312(b); Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Dina Currado, CSR #10908, dinacurrado@gmail.com, 661-675-5688 (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Continued To Sep-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Kimberly D. Pye; Wilson, Elser, Moskowitz, Edelman & Dicker LLP; 415-433-0990; appearing as counsel for defendant De Wolf Realty Co.
William F. Horsey; Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP; 415-362-2580; appearing as counsel for defendant De Wolf Realty Co.
Ryan M. Herrera; Tenant Law Group, PC; 888-510-7511; appearing as counsel for plaintiffs Anna Simmons and Jeff Haviken.

Counsel seek clarification as to the court's tentative ruling. Plaintiff's counsel indicates that sections left blank on their Separate Statement represent undisputed material. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to September 14, 2023 for the Plaintiff to comply with CRC 3.1350(f)(1)-(2). Amended Separate Statement in Opposition must be filed and served no later than August 28, 2023 by 5:00 p.m.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
